title: Today screen: grouped checklist + toggle completion + refresh

task.description: Implement Today checklist UI: load active habits, categories, and today completion records; render a grouped FlatList with category headers; allow one-tap completion toggle with optimistic UI only after persistence succeeds; include pull-to-refresh + loading/error/empty states.
acceptance_criteria: Screen root uses `SafeAreaView` and list uses `FlatList` with `RefreshControl` (no `ScrollView` wrapping the list)
When data is loading, an `ActivityIndicator` is visible and no habit rows are rendered until load resolves
Rows are grouped by category name, with a "No Category" header for `categoryId=null`
Tapping a row toggle calls `setCompletion()` and updates the completed UI state only after the promise resolves; if it rejects, the row remains in its prior state
On toggle failure, an on-screen error message and a "Retry" button are shown; tapping Retry re-attempts the last toggle
Pull-to-refresh re-runs the local load and stops the refresh spinner within 2 seconds of the promise settling (success or error)
All interactive row controls meet min hit size by applying `min-h-[48px]` to the Pressable area

definition_of_done: No crashes when DB is ready and tables are empty (empty state renders)
ui_requirements: SafeAreaView p-4; title text-3xl font-bold; FlatList of mixed rows (header + habit). Habit row: left icon + name, right toggle/checkbox. States: loading spinner, empty state (icon + text + CTA to create habit), error with retry, pull-to-refresh.
